tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend bundle format + zip-install endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** plugin.json Pydantic model + loader fallback (plugin.json → server.json) + install_from_zip with safety guards + POST /api/plugins/upload (multipart). Removes /api/plugins/install (v1 URL-fetch endpoint).

**Files:**
- Create: glados/plugins/bundle.py
- Modify: glados/plugins/loader.py, runner.py, store.py, __init__.py
- Modify: glados/webui/plugin_endpoints.py, tts_ui.py
- Create: tests/test_plugins_bundle.py, tests/test_plugins_zip_install.py
- Modify: tests/test_webui_plugins.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- PluginJSON model with three runtime mode subclasses
- Six setting types
- v1_to_v2 conversion for legacy server.json installs
- install_from_zip safety: 50 MB compressed, 200 MB total uncompressed, 50 MB per entry, no symlinks, no traversal, no absolute paths, no zip-bombs
- POST /api/plugins/upload accepts multipart
- POST /api/plugins/install removed
- 25+ new tests pass

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_plugins_*.py tests/test_webui_plugins.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/plugins/bundle.py", "glados/plugins/loader.py", "glados/plugins/runner.py", "glados/plugins/store.py", "glados/webui/plugin_endpoints.py", "glados/webui/tts_ui.py", "tests/test_plugins_bundle.py", "tests/test_plugins_zip_install.py", "tests/test_webui_plugins.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_plugins_bundle.py tests/test_plugins_zip_install.py tests/test_webui_plugins.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PluginJSON model + 3 runtime modes + 6 settings types", "v1_to_v2 backward-compat", "install_from_zip safety guards", "upload endpoint", "install endpoint removed", "25+ new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: WebUI rework — Upload tab, page-conformance, terminology pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drop Add-by-URL section. Add Upload (drag-drop + file picker). Form labels from setting.label not key. Page-conformance to Memory/SSL/Logs/Raw YAML. Category title-case label map. Terminology sweep.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js
- Modify: glados/webui/static/style.css

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Page wrapper / header / card / tab-strip match existing Configuration sub-page conventions
- Manage tab: Upload section (drag-drop + file picker, .zip only, 50 MB)
- Form fields use setting.label
- Category labels via JS map
- No 'slug' / 'manifest' / 'runtime.yaml' / 'secrets.env' / env-var keys visible

**Verify:** Manual UI inspection on deploy.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/ui.js", "glados/webui/static/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["design-system conformance", "upload section + drag-drop", "setting.label in forms", "category title-case", "terminology sweep"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Docs (architecture migration + bundle-format guide + CHANGES 33 + README)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Operator-facing bundle format guide + architecture v1→v2 migration note + CHANGES Change 33 + README install flow update.

**Files:**
- Create: docs/plugin-bundle-format.md
- Modify: docs/plugins-architecture.md, docs/CHANGES.md, README.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- plugin-bundle-format.md covers layout / schema / 3 modes / 'wrap any MCP server' tutorial
- Architecture doc has v2 section + migration note
- CHANGES 33 follows Change 32 structure
- README mentions Browse + Upload (no Add-by-URL)

**Verify:** `git diff --stat` shows only 4 doc files

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/plugin-bundle-format.md", "docs/plugins-architecture.md", "docs/CHANGES.md", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "git diff --stat", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bundle format guide", "architecture migration note", "CHANGES 33", "README updated"]}
```
